---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for AI Applyd
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What job-search problem are you trying to solve? Describe it in plain language. Skip the implementation for now.

## Your use case

A real example from your own job search if you have one. The more specific the better.

## What you'd want

What would make this problem go away. This can be a feature idea, a tweak to existing behaviour, a missing integration.

## How important is it

- [ ] Blocking me from using the product
- [ ] I'd use this every day
- [ ] I'd use this occasionally
- [ ] Nice to have

## Would you pay extra for it

- [ ] Yes, as a separate add-on
- [ ] Yes, expect it in an existing plan
- [ ] No

## Anything else

Optional. Links to similar features in other tools, screenshots of what you'd imagine, related blog posts.
